generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor for capturing 3D environment data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorSensor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Motor sensor measuring speed and torque"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringServoSensor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo sensor measuring steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring vehicle state parameters such as speed, position, and orientation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance MotorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSensor
]

instance SteeringDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringServoSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance LiDARRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance MotorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor speed and torque data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance SteeringData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state parameters including speed, position, and orientation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for preprocessing sensor data including point cloud clustering and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Data Translation FE component for serialization, message alignment, and unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance UserInterfaceFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "User Interface FE component split into 3D Visualization and Control Panel subcomponents"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring service featuring real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks, with capabilities to view, save, and generate reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ProjectedPathVisualization, ObjectTrackVisualization, ReportGeneration
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading service where ACC system (lead vehicle detection, desired speed calculation based on distance, and actuation commands) is offloaded from vehicle ECUs to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, DesiredSpeedCalculation, ActuationCommands
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management service enabling operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and send emergency braking commands, while developers utilize data collection for troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableDisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBrakingCommand, DataCollectionForTroubleshooting
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data"
]

instance ProjectedPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of projected driving paths"
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of detected object tracks"
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Capability to generate reports from monitored data"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicles for ACC system"
]

instance DesiredSpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Calculation of desired speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance ActuationCommands : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sending actuation commands to vehicle control systems"
]

instance EnableDisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable ACC system remotely"
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system"
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Send emergency braking command to vehicle"
]

instance DataCollectionForTroubleshooting : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Data collection for developer troubleshooting purposes"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin environment containing physical sensors and actuators"
    base:contains LiDARSensor, MotorSensor, SteeringServoSensor, VehicleStateSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital Twin environment containing data processing and services"
    base:contains DataPreProcessingFE, DataTranslationFE
]

instance UserEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User environment for operator and developer interaction"
    base:contains UserInterfaceFE
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system enforces 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy across all devices for computation offloading, complying with safety-critical vehicular standards that typically require stricter synchronization (<100 ms), with this requirement dictated by hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, organizing software components into three entities (Physical Twin Entity hosting resource-specific and general automotive functionality like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking, Digital Twin Entity for data management and control, User Entity for user-facing components) each deployed on dedicated hardware. ROS2 packages implement each FE as nodes, with deviations in the Physical Twin Entity's scope impacting functionality ownership and engineering processes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs via ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP in the transport layer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard (Part 2: Reference Architecture), defining entities including Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) implement tasks using OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) for data collection, device control, and interoperability."
]
